---
title: "Flex dashboad "
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Chart A

```{r}
library(flexdashboard)
library(readr)
AmesHousing <- read_csv("Class activities /AmesHousing.csv")

inputPanel(
  sliderInput( inputId = "year",
               lable = "Select a year"),
  min = 1872, max = 2010, step =1, value =1960)
)
renderPlot( 
  ggplot(AmesHousing, aes(x = input$year, y = Overall.Qual))  + 
          geom_jitter()
  )
  
```

### Chart C

```{r}

```
